'''Dedra''' was a student interested in the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] who studied under [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Murk Lundi]]. Following the incident which drove the doctor and his two prized students, [[Norval]] and [[Omal]], insane, Dedra took care of the unstable Omal.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers]]'' {{1st}}
